index.title: Lex — Translator and Vocabulary Trainer
index.subtitle: Your personal translator and vocabulary trainer.
index.subtitle_detail: Translate words from 90+ languages, save them to your dictionary, and memorize them forever with spaced repetition.
index.translate_card.title: 🌍 Translator
index.translate_card.description: Found an unfamiliar word? Translate it to Russian and save it with one click to learn later.
index.review_card.title: 🧠 Training
index.review_card.description: Review saved words. The algorithm will pick the ones you are starting to forget.

settings.title: Settings — Lex
settings.heading: Language settings
settings.description: By default, the language of the entered text is auto-detected. You can select a specific language if the translation is detected incorrectly. The target language is always Russian.
